issues.description: SearchDeck action is incorrect. The card effect places cards FROM trash TO deck bottom, not searching from deck. Should use TrashFromHand or similar trash-to-deck mechanic, or a custom trash placement action.
Filter missing required constraints. Should specify exactly 3 cards from trash, not 'Any' from deck.
Target scope is too broad. Should be 'ChooseOwnCharacterWithType' or equivalent to enforce SMILE type restriction, and should allow UP TO 2 characters (not all chosen characters).
Missing type filter for SMILE. Current target does not restrict to {SMILE} type characters.
Duration 'EndOfTurn' is acceptable for 'during this turn', but verify this matches intended game semantics (should apply for remainder of current turn only).
